cookieManagement.title: Cookie Management
cookieManagement.description: View or update your cookie preferences and settings at any time.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie Settings
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to save your display preferences, such as your dark/light mode and language settings. These cookies are essential for the application to remember your choices.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Enable essential cookies necessary for the basic functioning of the application.

statistical.title: Statistical Cookies
statistical.description: Enable cookies for statistical purposes. These cookies help us understand how our application is used and improve its performance.

cookieConsent.notFunctional: This category isn't functional yet — nothing is stored under it right now.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Enable cookies for marketing purposes. These cookies help us deliver personalized advertisements and track the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns.

preferences.title: Preference Cookies
preferences.description: Enable cookies for preferences purposes. These cookies help us remember your settings and preferences to provide a more personalized experience.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: Information on how we handle your data.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy outlines how we collect and process information within our job tracker application.

data.title: Collected Information
data.description: We only collect the data necessary for the application to function properly:
data.identity: Personal identity: Name and email address.
data.professional: Professional details: CV, links (GitHub, LinkedIn, website).
data.jobTracker: Job tracking data: Applications, notes, and skill matrices.

control.title: Your Control
control.description: You have full control over your data. You can adjust visibility settings or delete your account and all associated data at any time via the Privacy Settings page.
control.warning: Please note that account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.

security.title: Data Security
security.description: We use modern encryption standards and secure protocols to ensure your data is stored safely and protected from unauthorized access.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions regarding your privacy, feel free to contact the development team via the repository's issue tracker.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.description: The Cookie Policy explains how we use cookies and similar technologies on our website. By using our website, you consent to the use of cookies as described in this policy.
cookiePolicy.lead: Our website uses "cookies" to improve user experience and ensure the proper functioning of the site's essential features. This policy explains what cookies we use and their role.

section1.title: 1. What are cookies?
section1.description: Cookies are small data files that your web browser stores on your computer or mobile device when you visit our website. They help us remember your preferences and ensure the secure operation of the application.

section2.title: 2. Cookies we use
section2.description: Currently, our site uses strictly necessary cookies only. These are essential for the basic security and functional requirements of the application (e.g., session management, authentication).
section2.note: Note: Statistical, marketing, and other preference cookies are currently inactive; we do not store data for these purposes.
section2.warning: The list of cookies may change from time to time, so we recommend that you check this policy periodically.

section3.title: 3. Managing and deleting cookies
section3.description: You can change your browser settings at any time to delete or block cookies. Please note that if you disable "strictly necessary" cookies, some features of our website may not function properly (e.g., you will not be able to log in).

section4.title: 4. Contact
section4.description: If you have any questions regarding the management of cookies, please contact us:

description.sessionToken: Used to identify the user session.
description.csrfToken: Security cookie used to prevent CSRF attacks.
description.xsrfToken: Security cookie used to prevent XSRF attacks.
description.callbackUrl: Technical data required for redirection after login.
